name: The Town Gate
entryDialogue: We are almost there, Pip! This is the Town Gate. Help Gus and use your key pieces to unlock the way forward!

objects.label: Gus the Gatekeeper
objects.dialogue: Ah, hello there! I am Gus. I look after this gate, but I have gone and forgotten the pattern to open it. And I see you have been collecting key pieces — you will need those too! Can you crack the pattern for me?

objects.label: Gate Panel
objects.dialogue: The gate panel glows softly. Three key slots wait to be filled, and a pattern lock sits above them.

objects.label: Signpost
objects.dialogue: The signpost points into the mist beyond the gate. You can just make out the words: More worlds await...

objects.label: Ivy
objects.dialogue: The ivy rustles in a gentle breeze. A small sparkle dances between the leaves.
